hero:
# Yelp Analytics

**Large-scale review ETL & sentiment analysis · Databricks · Spark · SQL**

## Hero Overview

A big-data pipeline processing 10M+ Yelp data points through Databricks ETL and applying the AFINN sentiment lexicon across 7M+ reviews to surface star-rating vs. sentiment bias.

Findings were packaged into sector-specific strategy directions, bridging distributed processing output to business decisions.

points.evidence: Built 5+ Databricks ETL pipelines automating ingestion/transformation of 10M+ data points, cutting processing time ~15 hours.
Applied the AFINN sentiment lexicon across 7M+ reviews with Spark, surfacing systematic star-rating vs. sentiment bias.
Surfaced 3 sector-specific behavior patterns (restaurants, salons, retail) and packaged 3 actionable strategy directions.

network_graph.title: Technology Capability Network
network_graph.description: Maps the project's core techniques to the tools used to implement them.

storyline:
# Storyline

## Context

Millions of Yelp reviews held category-level behavioral signal, but raw star ratings alone obscured how sentiment actually diverged across business sectors.

## Workflow

Distributed ingestion & transformation → sentiment scoring at scale → sector pattern detection → stakeholder-facing strategy report.

## Technical Implementation

- **ETL:** 5+ Databricks/Spark pipelines transforming 10M+ data points with SQL, cutting end-to-end processing ~15 hours.
- **Sentiment:** AFINN lexicon applied to 7M+ reviews with Spark, exposing star-rating vs. sentiment bias by category.
- **Insight:** 3 sector-specific behavior patterns (restaurants, salons, retail) grounded in review-sentiment evidence.

## Outcomes

Bridged Databricks ETL output to business strategy, translating large-scale review data into 3 actionable, category-aligned strategy directions.
